title: ononis natrix subsp. ramosissima
intro: Ononis natrix subsp. ramosissima, also known as the Spiny Restharrow or Spiny Horseshoe-vetch, is a plant species that belongs to the legume family and is characterized by its spiny stems and purple flowers. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful in treating various health issues such as wounds, skin irritations, and digestive problems. The plant is rich in flavonoids and other bioactive compounds that contribute to its health benefits, including antioxidant and immunomodulatory activities, which can help protect against oxidative stress and promote overall well-being. Ononis natrix subsp. ramosissima can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing.
